description: Registry of all ingestion sources. Machine-readable. Maps source → normaliser → router.

sources.name: webhook-generic
sources.description: Catch-all webhook receiver. Accepts any POST, stores raw, routes by content-type header.

sources.name: form-submit
sources.description: Intake for all tenant-facing form submissions

sources.name: github-events
sources.description: GitHub webhook receiver — push, PR, issue, deployment events

sources.name: file-upload
sources.description: S3/Supabase Storage ingestion of CSV, JSON, PDF uploads

sources.name: scheduled-poll
sources.description: Cron-triggered API poll for external data sources
